headings.usage: H1, H2, Hero Text, Big numbers. Use uppercase and tracking-wider for intense print aesthetic.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI Elements, Cards, Navigation, Product details.

script_accent.usage: Tagline 'Bring Your Ideas to Life', decorative script elements breaking the grid.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing, brutalist print-grid inspiration. High-contrast geometric blocks.
layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (sharp print edge feel)

motion_interactions.hover: Magnetic button effect, sharp color swatch reveal on t-shirt card hover.
motion_interactions.scroll: Smooth scroll (lenis) with staggered fade-ins for product grid.
motion_interactions.cursor: Custom CMYK dot cursor or ink-drip cursor if possible.
motion_interactions.buttons: Hover states must contrast sharply (e.g. transparent with cyan border to solid cyan background).

components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl) with sharp bottom border (border-white/10). Desktop nav links visible. Mobile hamburger menu.
components.hero: Dark background utilizing 'c1indlcw_aiel-banner.png'. Large typography block with 'Bring Your Ideas to Life' in Italianno script font + CMYK paint splatter background. Prominent CTA to catalog.
components.product_card: Solid secondary background (#151515), sharp edges, 1px border. Image area on top. Hovering reveals color swatches. Price badge in CMYK accent.
components.product_detail: Split bento layout. Left: Sticky product image with upload artwork preview zone. Right: Title, GSM/Fabric details, Size selector (S/M/L/XL/XXL) as sharp square toggle buttons, Quantity, Print area (Front/Back) selector, 'Add to Cart' and vibrant WhatsApp checkout button.
components.services_strip: Marquee ticker using react-fast-marquee. Text: 'DTF Printing • Sublimation • Vinyl • Premium Quality • Fast Service'. Font: Anton, uppercase, tracking-widest, yellow or cyan text on dark background.
components.whatsapp_fab: Floating action button in bottom right, fixed position, z-50. Vivid green (#25D366) to pop out. Opens wa.me/919150234277.
components.contact_footer: Large typographic footer. Includes address (Puducherry), Email (aielenterprises3321@gmail.com), GST (34GIQPS9151C). Uses CMYK accents for dividers and links.
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='whatsapp-checkout-button', data-testid='size-selector-M').

visual_enhancers.textures: Halftone dot textures (CSS radial gradient), paint splatter overlays using CMYK colors.
visual_enhancers.borders: Registration-mark accents in corners (crop marks) for the print shop aesthetic. 1px solid sharp borders.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Hard drop shadows instead of soft blurs (e.g., box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px #00B4FF).

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind with explicit CMYK hex codes provided in this JSON.
Implement product grid utilizing the provided Unsplash product images.
Install and use 'react-fast-marquee' for the services strip.
Ensure ALL buttons, forms, and interactive toggles have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-checkout-btn').
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing/hero pages. Avoid Shadcn for hero sections to allow custom overlapping.
Avoid standard border-radius (rounded-xl/lg) - keep things sharp (rounded-none) with 1px borders to mimic cut paper and print shop aesthetics.
Implement shopping cart context and WhatsApp checkout feature which formats the order text and opens wa.me/919150234277.
Include registration/crop marks (small L-shaped borders) in the corners of major sections or hero cards.
DO NOT use placeholder images (via.placeholder.com etc). Only use the URLs provided in this JSON.
Make the UI strictly Dark Mode. Avoid 'fintech dark' vibes; this is a rugged/vibrant print studio.
